**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

The 'Apple Inc.' corporate hallucination has been completely purged. Nanjing Ruimat Network Technology Co., Ltd. exhibits a profound contradiction between its 'Electronic Device Manufacturing' registry tag and its functional reality. Its business scope is an extreme 'supermarket' of disparate industries, claiming capabilities in environmental monitoring instrument manufacturing, sewage treatment, earthwork construction, landscaping, advertising design, and food import/export.
